reflexivity.evidence: @CodinCowboy max-minted AXIOM Tool Pass within 90min of the announce; @bankrbot RT'd the receipt. Tool Pass minted → real volume on Base from the announce thread.

narratives.thesis: ERC-8257 + @opensea/tool-sdk just hit the Base agent ecosystem. First paid agent endpoints starting to ship. Tool passes (NFT-as-API-key) emerging as the bypass primitive.
narratives.bearCase: Agent-to-agent demand stays tiny; only humans pay, and humans prefer free APIs over $0.01/call paywalls. Standard fails to fork-resist a competing registry.

narratives.thesis: GITLAWB / AEON / Surplus driving the Bankr leaderboard. Real volume ($5M+/day on GITLAWB), real product attached (gitlawb bounties, aeon framework, Surplus index).
narratives.bearCase: Peak phase = rotation into next cohort. Top-3 stickiness is fragile; whoever doesn't ship a real product feature gets demoted within 2 weeks.

narratives.thesis: x402 fixture stable 8+ days. Agents starting to discover services via bazaar. Real USDC settlement on Base for sub-cent calls.
narratives.bearCase: Wallet UX still requires a hot key. Agent-to-agent paid calls remain a thought experiment for most teams.

narratives.thesis: Daily 50/50 burn-to-vault distribution + WETH → BNKR/USDC treasury split running for 13+ days. xAXIOM price/share trending up. Stakers get paid in compounding share, not yield.
narratives.bearCase: Total burn % still under 4% of supply. Without external buy pressure, vault appreciation is a closed loop. Needs more buyers than stakers to keep working.

narratives.thesis: Adapter8004 + ERC-721 awakening flow lets a normie NFT become an addressable agent. First minted normie awakening confirmed onchain.
narratives.bearCase: Asymmetric collector interest — most normie holders just want the floor up, not a sentient PFP. Adapter complexity scares off integrators.

narratives.thesis: Cope-stage. TVL has stopped growing month-over-month. Points farms exhausted.
narratives.bearCase: No bear case to argue — this is the bear case. Narrative has rolled.

narratives.thesis: Election cycle behind us but volume sticky around sports + economic prints. Real product-market fit signal.
narratives.bearCase: Regulatory overhang in US. Crypto-side competitors lack the liquidity Polymarket built.

narratives.thesis: The umbrella narrative everyone slots under. Peak-meta — saying 'AI x crypto' is no longer a thesis, it's table stakes.
narratives.bearCase: Too broad to act on. Useful as a sector tag, not a position.
